title: WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY EDUCATION - 211info
text: YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Weatherization services are available to help improve home safety, maximize energy efficiency, and promote housing affordability. Weatherization services may include reducing heat waste by reducing air infiltration in the following ways: -Replacing broken window panes, re-glazing windows, applying interior caulking, installing new weather-stripping on windows and doors, and insulating water pipes. -Efficiency Upgrades LED lighting, low-flow shower, and faucet kits. -Heating Systems: Pressure test the forced-air system, air seal, and insulate the supply and return duct system. -Install as appropriate: flame retention burners, electronic ignition devices, and heating system repairs. -Attic, wall, and floor insulation. -Skirting: Install appropriate materials around the perimeter of the dwelling unit to control airflow in the crawl space. Energy education services include one-on-one client meetings, energy audits conducted by an energy technician, and workshops. Low-cost self-help kits are available to households to reduce their energy burden. 1317 NE Dustin Court McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: -Homeowners or renters with household income must be at or below 200% of Federal Poverty -Renters: Duplex or a quadraplex, 50% of the units must be occupied by income-eligible households for the entire building to qualify for weatherization. In other multi-dwelling applications, it is required that 66% of the units meet the gross income guidelines. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 687-1483 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Weatherization Services (503) 687-1483 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and application. Based on availability of funds, applicants are selected from a priority waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Dustin Court is a cul-de-sac that was created for the YCAP building, so many GPS systems do not show this road. Enter "2170 NE Riverside Drive, McMinnville, OR" into a GPS system to get close to the building and from there, it is obvious where the YCAP building is. Without a GPS system: Turn onto SE Riverside Drive from SE Lafayette Road. Once on Riverside Drive, the building is about 200 yards down on the left. Services: Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Energy Conservation Issues Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - ANYDOOR PLACE COORDINATED ENTRY UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP
